productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Mactelo Black Sports Shoes
description: Whether it's capoeira or karate, the adidas Mactelo shoes give you a natural feel for fast sweeps and swift strikes. These shoes feature a soft recycled leather upper, a convenient lace cover and a flexible outsole.UpperSoft and comfortable recycled leather upperSynthetic lining for durable comfortPull on tag concealing the lace for a smooth upper surfaceShiny 3-Stripes across toe for interesting lookBranding on the heel and tongueMeshed and padded collar and tongue for better comfortMidsoleEVA midsole and padded collar offers comfortOutsoleTwo-piece razor-cut flexible rubber outsole provides superior grip as well as maximum ground contactshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
